issues.sample: FROM A STOP, THE VEHICLE HAS A SIGNIFICANT HESITATION PULLING AWAY FROM A STOP SIGN/REDLIGHT ETC. AS YOU PUSHING THE GAS PEDAL DOWN, IT HESITATES THEN ACCELERATES HARD. HAS 340 MILES ON IT AT THIS TIME. DEALER AND KIA STATE THIS IS NORMAL FOR THE NEW TRANSMISSION/TURBO DESIGN. EV

narrative.headline: What 2018 Kia Soul Ev owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 208 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Engine (63% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
